name: Alucard
bio:
Child of the Vampire King, regarded as the heir to the future Castle. An idealist who dreams of building a world where humans and vampires coexist in peace. He once clashed with his father's realism; after leaving the castle, his experiences made his ideals more firm and decisive.

Role: Burst Harvest
Specialty: A mid-backline Blitz-type hero good at countering Control lineups. When allies are controlled or defeated, it gains [Blood Will] to increase ATK and Critical Strike. After stacking 10 layers, it enters [Demon Form] to increase Critical Strike and Critical Damage, gaining powerful burst harvest ability and group Bleed application ability.

skillSlots.name: Bloodbat Shadow
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy hero with lowest DEF for 300% P.DMG with 100% probability to apply 1 stack of [Bleed].

skillSlots.name: Voidshatter Slash
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy hero with lowest DEF, dealing 3 instances of 140% P.DMG with 30% additional Crit Rate for this attack.

effects.name: Fiend Trans
effects.description: When [Bleed] is applied to enemy Heroes, gains 1 stack of [Bloodlust] (max 1 trigger per target per turn).

effects.name: Fiend Trans
effects.description: Recovers HP equal to 20% ATK each time [Bloodlust] is gained.

effects.name: Fiend Trans
effects.description: After active attack, releases [Vacuum Blade] at all enemies with [Bleed] (max 1 trigger per turn).

effects.name: Fiend Trans
effects.description: Immediately casts [Voidrive Slash] without Consumption when entering [Demonkin Form] status.
